function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and completed its request. I added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (OCR extraction from visible note content) to all 6 listed finance records while preserving each original body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree -> read AGENTS -> context), inspected 99_system workflows/schemas before task work, used OCR/schema guidance for structured extraction, preserved full original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to run six listed finance docs through OCR workflow. The workflow and schema docs required extracting visible fields into frontmatter and preserving body text. All six files were read and updated accordingly, and the inbox file was then deleted as required for a fully completed inbox task.
